---
title: "Model Fit Summary (Using Shares)"
author: "Katsuhiro Komatsu"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    number_sections: true
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
gc()
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = F, warning = F, message = F, fig.height = 3, fig.width = 6)
library(psych)
library(magrittr)
library(xtable)
library(knitr)
library(lfe)
library(kableExtra)
library(ggplot2); theme_classic()
library(Dispatching)

partwage_pref <- readRDS("../output/partwage_pref.RDS")
num_labor <- readRDS("../output/num_labor_cz.RDS")
num_establishments <- readRDS("../output/num_establishments_cz.RDS")
share_data <- readRDS("../output/share_data_two_shares.RDS")

```

<!-- # Platform's Problem -->
<!-- Profit function: -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- \Pi_i = q_i (f_i - w_i) - D_i^W c_i^W - D_i^F c_i^F. -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- First-order conditions: -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- -q_i + \frac{\partial q_i}{\partial w_i}(f_i-w_i) - \frac{\partial D_i^W}{\partial w_i}c_i^W - \frac{\partial D_i^F}{\partial w_i}c_i^F = 0 \\ -->
<!-- q_i + \frac{\partial q_i}{\partial f_i}(f_i-w_i) - \frac{\partial D_i^W}{\partial f_i}c_i^W - \frac{\partial D_i^F}{\partial f_i}c_i^F = 0, -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- where -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- \frac{\partial D^W_i}{\partial w_i} = \frac{1}{\lambda^W}\left(1+\frac{\beta + 2(\alpha-1)}{2(2-\alpha-\beta)}\right)(1 - s_i^W)s_i^W, \\ -->
<!-- \frac{\partial D^W_i}{\partial w_i} = \frac{1}{\lambda^W}\frac{ \alpha}{2(2-\alpha-\beta)}(1-s^F_i)s_i^F,  \\ -->
<!-- \frac{\partial D^W_i}{\partial f_i} =- \frac{1}{\lambda^F}\frac{\beta}{2(2-\alpha-\beta)}(1-s_i^W)s_i^W, \\ -->
<!-- \frac{\partial D^F_i}{\partial f_i} = -\frac{1}{\lambda^F}\left(1+\frac{\alpha+2(\beta-1)}{2(2-\alpha-\beta)}\right)(1-s_i^F)s_i^F. -->
<!-- $$ -->
<!-- In this specification, if marginal costs are constant, then $(1-s_i)s_i$ is the only source for heterogeneity in how demands respond to price changes that determines the distribution of $w_i$ and $f_i$. -->

<!-- ## Variations in shares in the actual data -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- share_data <- readRDS("../output/share_data_two_shares.RDS") -->

<!-- ds <- share_data %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::mutate( -->
<!--     ln_s_prod_W = log(s_W) + log(1-s_W), -->
<!--     ln_s_prod_F = log(s_F) + log(1-s_F) -->
<!--   ) %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::select(ln_s_prod_W, ln_s_prod_F) %>%  -->
<!--   describe(skew = F, -->
<!--            ranges = F, -->
<!--            trim = 0, -->
<!--          quant = c(.05, .25, .5, .75, .95)) -->

<!-- ds$vars <- NULL -->
<!-- ds$se <- NULL -->
<!-- rownames(ds) <- c("log  s_W(1-s_W)", -->
<!--                   "log  s_F(1-s_F)") -->

<!-- kable(ds, digits = 1) -->
<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ### Variation across cz-year -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- share_data <- readRDS("../output/share_data_two_shares.RDS") -->

<!-- ds <- share_data %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::mutate( -->
<!--     ln_s_prod_W = log(s_W) + log(1-s_W), -->
<!--     ln_s_prod_F = log(s_F) + log(1-s_F) -->
<!--   ) %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::select(ln_s_prod_W, ln_s_prod_F, year, cz) %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::group_by(year, cz) %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::summarise_all(~ mean(.)) %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::ungroup() %>%  -->
<!--   dplyr::select(-year, -cz) %>%  -->
<!--   describe(skew = F, -->
<!--            ranges = F, -->
<!--            trim = 0, -->
<!--          quant = c(.05, .25, .5, .75, .95)) -->

<!-- ds$vars <- NULL -->
<!-- ds$se <- NULL -->
<!-- rownames(ds) <- c("log  s_W(1-s_W)", -->
<!--                   "log  s_F(1-s_F)") -->

<!-- kable(ds, digits = 1) -->
<!-- ``` -->



# Model Fit with Exact Residuals {.tabset}

## Linear Model
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear/share_firm.png")
```

## Log Model

### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log/share_firm.png")
```

## Log-linear Model

### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear/share_firm.png")
```

## Linear Model (Ridge)
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear_ridge/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear_ridge/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear_ridge/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/linear_ridge/share_firm.png")
```

## Log Model (Ridge)
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_ridge/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_ridge/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_ridge/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_ridge/share_firm.png")
```

## Log-linear Model (Ridge)
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear_ridge/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear_ridge/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear_ridge/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/exact/log_linear_ridge/share_firm.png")
```

# Model Fit without Residuals {.tabset}
## Linear Model
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear/share_firm.png")
```

## Log Model

### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log/share_firm.png")
```

## Log-linear Model

### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear/share_firm.png")
```

## Linear Model (Ridge)
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear_ridge/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear_ridge/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear_ridge/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/linear_ridge/share_firm.png")
```

## Log Model (Ridge)
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_ridge/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_ridge/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_ridge/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_ridge/share_firm.png")
```

## Log-linear Model (Ridge)
### Wage
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear_ridge/wage.png")
```

### Fee
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear_ridge/fee.png")
```


### Worker share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear_ridge/share_worker.png")
```

### Firm share
```{r, out.width="50%"}
knitr::include_graphics("../figuretable/model_fit/no_residuals/log_linear_ridge/share_firm.png")
```
